decision.reason: treatment beat control by 150.0 point(s) with no hard constraint failures

provenBehavior: The deterministic harness runs the same fixture with semantic evidence disabled and enabled.
The control run exposes no semantic-neighbor links and produces no finding.
The treatment run exposes semantic-neighbor links and produces a traced Refactoring Finding.
Treatment fixtures can run fix and revalidate through the normal CLI while rejecting test mutation.
The run records hard constraint failures separately from quality metrics.
unprovenModelBackedRoi: Live model-backed ROI remains out of scope for this deterministic command.
nextInputs: Add optional model-backed repeated samples before claiming live-provider ROI.

results.name: Semantic evidence review ROI
results.description: Control/treatment ROI fixture proving semantic evidence promotes a sibling formatter refactoring candidate without producing the finding when semantic evidence is disabled.

results.name: Semantic evidence false-positive trap
